Landing.title: Knowledge Is Power.
Landing.subtitle: Welcome to BrainDump, your personal second brain. A minimalist, fast, and structured home for all your technical notes and reading materials.
Landing.step1Desc: Use the sidebar to browse categories and folders. Everything is structured physically.
Landing.step2Desc: Focus on reading with a distraction-free layout and clean typography.
Landing.step3Desc: Capture insights, organize thoughts, and build your own knowledge base.
